resultList.dtldesc: Experience the allure of modern living with this stunning 2 BHK flat available for sale in the esteemed Finsbury Park community, situated along the scenic Bagalur Main Road in Bangalore. This exquisite residence offers the perfect blend of elegance and practicality, where luxury and comfort converge to create a truly exceptional living experience.::::::Property Specifications ::::::Step into this inviting 2 BHK apartment, boasting a generous super built-up area of 999 sq. ft., where endless possibilities await. Elegant vitrified tiles throughout the apartment combine visual appeal with easy maintenance.::::::Facilities ::::::This apartment offers an array of amenities designed for comfort and security, including covered parking, a reliable water supply from both borewell and corporation sources, 100% power backup, round-the-clock security guards, CCTV surveillance, and multiple lifts. Within a 1-kilometer radius, you will find esteemed schools, well-equipped hospitals, bustling malls, and supermarkets to meet all your daily needs. The area boasts excellent public transport connectivity and easy access to banks and ATMs, ensuring a seamless urban lifestyle. Additionally, the airport is just a short drive away, providing effortless travel convenience.::::

resultList.dtldesc: Embrace the charm of this newly constructed 3 BHK villa, a golden opportunity for discerning buyers, ideally situated on Malur Whitefield Road in Bangalore. With the added advantage of freehold ownership rights, this property is not just a home its a valuable investment in your future. Property Specifications This vastu-compliant and east-facing property spans a carpet area of 1700 sqft, providing an idyllic living space for you and your family. Spread across three well-planned floors, this semi-furnished villa ensures a comfortable and convenient lifestyle. The ground floor boasts a bedroom with an attached bathroom equipped with modern Western fittings and a geyser. The living cum dining room provides a spacious area for family gatherings. The kitchen is designed for efficiency, and theres a storage unit under the staircase for added convenience. Youll also find a utility room and a small study room on this floor.  Moving to the first floor, youll discover two more bedrooms, each with attached bathrooms featuring contemporary Western amenities and geysers. The first floor also offers a lounge hall and expansive L-shaped balconies that are attached to two bedrooms and the lounge hall. resultList.dtldesc: Are you looking for a family home or a peaceful retreat in Bangalore? Nestled in a premium development that promises a fulfilling experience for you and your loved ones, here is a 2 BHK Flat for sale in Prestige Misty Waters, Kempapura, Bangalore. ::::::Make this stunning flat your new home and experience the ultimate in comfort and convenience!::::::Property Specifications ::::::Situated on the 13th floor of a 23-floor tower, the apartment offers breathtaking views of the city skyline, complemented by spacious interiors and elegant finishes. Well-ventilated, this beautiful flat is constructed over the carpet area of 1180 sq ft, offering comfort in every step. The 2 BHK flat is designed with Vastu-compliant architecture, ensuring a positive and harmonious living environment. ::::::Ready to occupy, this semi-furnished flat comes with essential electrical fixtures such as lights and fans. As you move in, you will be greeted in the living cum dining area, where the living space includes a TV stand and a shoe rack. Along with 2 bedrooms adorned with wardrobes, there are also 2 western bathrooms, one of which is attached to the master bedroom, and the other is a common bathroom, both equipped with geyser and shower cubicles. ::::::A spacious balcony attached to the living room offers a peaceful retreat and a beautiful view of the surrounding area. Moreover, the modular kitchen is a chef’s delight, featuring cabinets, a chimney, a hob, a granite platform, and a stainless steel sink along with a Gail piped gas connection. The wooden flooring in the bedrooms adds a touch of warmth and sophistication, while the rest of the apartment has vitrified tile flooring. ::::::Facilities ::::::Prestige Misty Waters ensures a luxurious and comfortable lifestyle with a host of top-notch facilities such as 100% power backup, 24x7 water supply, a clubhouse, a swimming pool, and multiple recreational options like a squash court and a badminton court. For those seeking relaxation and wellness, there’s a full-fledged gym, spa, sauna, steam, and even a hair salon. ::::::The complex also offers a conference theatre for professional events or social gatherings. Security is of paramount importance, with CCTVs installed throughout the premises and a security guard on-site for added peace of mind. Additionally, covered parking ensures that residents’ vehicles are well-protected.::::::Locality ::::::Prestige Misty Waters is situated just 1km away from The Sindhi English Medium School and PU College are just 1 km away, making it a perfect location for families with school-going children. Healthcare needs are met with Manipal Hospital and Aster Hospital, both within a 1 km radius. ::::::For shopping and leisure, the Mall of Asia and More Supermarket are nearby, and banks and ATMs are easily accessible. Roadwsys are abundant, with an upcoming metro station and Hebbal Railway Station in proximity, further enhancing connectivity. ::

resultList.dtldesc: Discover a charming 3 BHK flat for sale in the heart of Hoodi, Bangalore. With a perfect 10 to 15-year-old construction, this well-kept home is vaastu compliant and south-facing, offering a balanced and peaceful living experience. A unique opportunity for those looking to settle in a prime, well-connected location.Property Specifications Spanning across a super built-up area of 1480 sqft with a carpet area of 1250 sqft, this semi-furnished 3 BHK flat is located on the 1st floor of a 4-floor building. The property includes three spacious bedrooms, each with an attached western-style bathroom, complete with two geysers for added convenience.Enjoy the luxury of two balconiesone attached to the master bedroom and another to the dining room, both offering a serene pool view. The flat features a separate living and dining area, perfect for family gatherings. The modern modular kitchen comes with a chimney and provision for a piped gas connection, with an adjacent utility area for laundry and extra storage. Vitrified tiles cover the entire flat, enhancing its elegant feel. Facilities Additional facilities include covered parking, 24-hour water supply, 100 power backup, security guard, CCTV cameras for safety, and two lifts, making this property ideal for a comfortable, secure living experience.Locality Located next to the Total Environment Backside office, this property enjoys a prime position with easy access to essential amenities. Schools, hospitals, and mallssupermarkets are all within 1 km, ensuring convenience for daily needs. Public transport is easily available, with buses and autos frequently serving the area.Banks and ATMs are nearby for quick financial transactions. The K.R. Puram Railway Station is just 3 to 4 km away, and the metro station is within 1.5 km, offering excellent connectivity. For shopping and entertainment, a large mall is located 3 km away, making this locality a well-connected and comfortable place to live.

resultList.dtldesc: Spacious 4 BHK flat for sale in Prestige Lakeside Habitat, Varthur, Bangalore. Benefited with freehold ownership rights, offering a modern living experience. The construction age is 5 to 10 years, ensuring a well-established and maintained property. Perfect for families seeking comfort and convenience in a prime location.Property Specifications This spacious 4-bedroom, 5-bathroom apartment offers a carpet area of 2019 sqft and is located on the 26th floor of a 29-floor building. Facing east, the apartment is vaastu compliant, providing abundant natural light and ventilation. The property is semi-furnished, with high-quality vitrified flooring throughout and modern amenities for a comfortable living experience.The apartment features 2 balconies, one attached to the kitchen and the other to the master bedroom, both offering a refreshing view of the greenery around. A separate living and dining area provides ample space for family gatherings. The modular kitchen is equipped with a chimney, piped gas connection, and a utility area for added convenience. The 4 attached bathrooms and 1 common bathroom are all western-style, complete with geysers.Facilities This property offers covered parking and 24-hour water supply. The building also features 100 power backup, security guards, CCTVs, and 3 lifts for easy access. In addition to these basic facilities, modern amenities such as a jogging and strolling track, park, gymnasium, swimming pool, clubhouse, rainwater harvesting system, waste disposal, maintenance staff, and service lift ensure that residents enjoy a comfortable and hassle-free lifestyle.Locality Varthur, located in the eastern part of Bangalore, is a vibrant locality known for its serene environment and rapidly developing infrastructure. It is well-connected to major areas of the city, with easy access to key roads such as the Varthur Road, Whitefield Road, and the Outer Ring Road. The area is home to several well-established schools, hospitals, and shopping centers, making it an ideal place for families and working professionals.Public transportation options, including buses and autos, are readily available, ensuring smooth connectivity to nearby areas. The locality is in close proximity to tech parks and commercial hubs, offering excellent prospects for professionals. Additionally, Varthur Lake, one of the largest in the city, enhances the areas appeal by offering a peaceful setting for outdoor activities and relaxation.
